chat-tailor.settings.downloadChatArchive: Download the chat log as HTML along with image files. Choose between standalone and incremental modes.
chat-tailor.dialog.download.title: Download Chat Log
chat-tailor.dialog.export.title: Export Chat Log
chat-tailor.dialog.export.mode.solo.hint: Same as before. Every HTML file embeds the full CSS.
chat-tailor.dialog.export.mode.merge.hin: HTML links an external chat-styles.css. Designed for stacking per-chapter HTMLs in a shared folder.
chat-tailor.dialog.export.mode.full.hint: Include every rule from active stylesheets. Larger file, but covers dynamic selectors with no gaps.
chat-tailor.dialog.export.existing.label: Existing chat-styles.css (optional)
chat-tailor.dialog.export.existing.hint: Select the chat-styles.css produced by a previous incremental export to union-merge into the new one. Leave empty to start fresh.
chat-tailor.dialog.export.error: Failed to export the chat log.
chat-tailor.settings.openChatArchiveWind: Open the current chat log in a new window.
chat-tailor.dialog.open.title: Show Chat Log
chat-tailor.dialog.open.content: Open the chat log in a new window.
chat-tailor.settings.includeWhisper.name: Include Whispers in Chat Log
chat-tailor.settings.includeWhisper.hint: Include whispers in the exported chat log.
chat-tailor.settings.hideWhisper.name: Hide Whispers in Chat Log
chat-tailor.settings.hideWhisper.hint: Conceal whispers in the chat log. They appear as a gray background and reveal their text when clicked.
chat-tailor.settings.customPrivTalkAlias: Register a custom character used at the start of a chitchat message. Some characters may not work due to conflicts with other modules or markdown options. The defaults ('/pt', '!', '`') are always preserved.
chat-tailor.settings.markdownDelUse.name: Apply Markdown Strikethrough in Chitchat
chat-tailor.settings.markdownDelUse.hint: When markdown is enabled in chat, text wrapped in ~ within chitchat messages is rendered with a strikethrough.
chat-tailor.settings.privTalkAsOOC.name: Create Chitchat as OOC
chat-tailor.settings.privTalkAsOOC.hint: Newly created chitchat messages are classified as OOC. The default is Other.
chat-tailor.settings.privTalkSpeakerLine: Line Break After Chitchat Speaker Name
Insert a line break between the speaker's name and the message body in chitchat.
Adjust the base font size of chat messages (default: 14px).
chat-tailor.settings.setPrivTalkFontSize: Adjust the font size of chitchat messages (default: 12px).
chat-tailor.settings.setPrivTalkFontOpac: Adjust the opacity of the black chitchat font color (default: 0.8).
chat-tailor.settings.setPrivTalkMarginLe: Adjust the left margin applied to chitchat messages (default: 10).
chat-tailor.settings.setPrivTalkBgBright: Brighten the chitchat background color (matches the user color). Adjustment may be needed when other modules override the chat background color (default: 0.7).
chat-tailor.settings.enableSpeakerBar.hi: Show a speaker bar above the chat input that displays and lets you lock the current speaker (token/actor). The page reloads when this setting changes.
chat-tailor.settings.baseMessageMerge.hi: Visually combine consecutive regular chat messages from the same player into a single group (applies top/middle/end styles). When disabled, regular messages are shown as individual bubbles. The page reloads when this setting changes.
chat-tailor.settings.privTalkMerge.name: Merge Chitchat Messages
chat-tailor.settings.privTalkMerge.hint: Visually combine consecutive chitchat messages from the same player into a single group (applies top/middle/end styles). When disabled, chitchat messages are shown as individual bubbles. The page reloads when this setting changes.
